name: Golf Life Center
about: Golf Life Center is a year-round indoor golf performance training and player development facility in Broomfield, Colorado. It is the only facility in the North Denver Metro area that combines cutting-edge technology for full swing, short game, and putting with personalized coaching and golf-specific fitness. The venue offers three indoor golf simulators equipped with professional-grade launch monitors and a dynamic putting green system, providing a comprehensive environment for golfers to practice and improve their game regardless of the weather.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level technology with Foresight Falcon and Trackman Launch Monitors for precise data tracking
Year-round playability with state-of-the-art simulators in any weather condition
Comprehensive approach combining practice, coaching, and golf-specific fitness under one roof

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor trusted by professionals

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You will need to bring your own clubs for practice and simulator sessions. The venue does not mention club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, and it appears to be a BYOB (bring your own beverage) facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: Time to complete 18 holes is not specified on the website.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers a Junior Elite Membership and youth programs, making it suitable for kids.
